gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T3.id) FROM ( SELECT T1.id FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid WHERE T1.artist = 'Volkan Baǵa' AND T2.language = 'French' GROUP BY T1.id ) AS T3
